title: Alchemistry - Redox
description: Fork of Alchemistry for 1.12.2 with fixes and improvements
body:
## Welcome to Alchemistry-Redox!

This is a fork of the 1.12.2 branch of [Alchemistry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alchemistry). As I'm currently the maintainer of [Antimatter Chemistry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/antimatter-chemistry) and [Volcano Block](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/volcano-block), which both utilize Alchemistry as one of their main mods, it was only a question of time before this fork became a reality. I talked to [Arcana](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dark_arcana/projects) (the current maintainer of Alchemistry for newer versions) before, to make sure he doesn't have any interest in what I do with the 1.12.2 of the mod as he is only responsible for 1.18+ versions of the mod. But enough of that let's have a look what changes we achieved in this fork!

![ ](https://github.com/Ender-Development/Alchemistry/blob/1.12.2/assets/info_graphic.png?raw=true)

### Changes

*   back ported the modern textures as they look way better then the current ones
*   fixed Reactor preview in the Alchemistry Patchouli Book
*   overhauled Fusion and Fission Reactors
    *   added Reactor Glass for both of them
    *   the core can now be aligned to all axis
    *   implemented a modifier system depending on the liquids in the core
*   refactored large parts of the mod
    *   updated internal dependencies
    *   redid all GUI textures, so that they properly align
    *   added JEI integration for the Fusion Recipes (no more Item Tooltips)
    *   added a pause button to all machines
    *   added Comparator capabilities to all machines
    *   rewrote the config system to allow editing it in game
    *   added more config options to most machines
*   custom Elements and Compounds (added by CraftTweaker or GroovyScript)
    *   can now be localized
    *   custom Elements now automatically get textured

![ ](https://github.com/Ender-Development/Alchemistry/blob/1.12.2/assets/blue_separator.png?raw=true)

## Requirements

*   [Forgelin-Continuous](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgelin-continuous)
*   [Alchemy Lib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alchemylib)
*   any mod that can generate [forge energy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/search?page=1&pageSize=20&sortBy=relevancy&class=mc-mods&categories=technology-energy&version=1.12.2&gameVersionTypeId=1)

![ ](https://github.com/Ender-Development/Alchemistry/blob/1.12.2/assets/red_separator.png?raw=true)

## Compatibility

*   [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-rofl-edition)
*   [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/had-enough-items)
*   [CraftTweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafttweaker)
*   [GroovyScript](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/groovyscript)
*   [JSON Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-paintings)
